fonts: Fraunces (Light, Light Italic — used for 'Bodhi' wordmark, italic 'you are.' accent)
Host Grotesk (Regular, Italic — used for 'Begin where' headline)
Manrope (Regular, Medium, SemiBold — body copy, link labels, section headings, legal)

assets.note: No raster/SVG image assets used in this footer node — all text-only. No logo image, no social-media icons (socials are text links: Newsletter, Instagram, YouTube, Email us).

1:675_topBlock_CTASection.subhead: Whether you want to teach, heal a specific thing, or simply move and breathe with people once a week — there's a door at Bodhi for that.

threeCards.title: Free Trial Session
threeCards.body: 50 Mins Session with the option of choosing from 10 slots in a day.

threeCards.title: Speak to us
threeCards.body: Talk to counsellor who can assess and offer recommendations

threeCards.title: Take a Guided Path
threeCards.body: Our assessment will guide you take direction best suited based on your experience

items.text:

Practice, taught honestly.
